ThemeModel: {name: string, primary: hex, secondary: hex, background: hex, textPrimary: hex, textSecondary: hex, buttonTextColor: hex, button_text_color: hex, defaultFont: string, font_family: string, globalBgImageUrl: url, globalBgColorHex: hex, category: string, description: string} // AI Hint: Global page theme — applies to ALL sections unless overridden.
hero: {title, subtitle, button_text, button_url, image_url, vertical_padding: 0-300, variant: 0-2, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color: hex, theme_override: string, bg_blur: 0-20, animation: {type: "fadeIn"|"slideUp"|"zoomIn"|"bounceIn", duration: ms, delay: ms, intensity: 0.1-2.0}} // AI Hint: Primary landing header.
hero_saas: {title, subtitle, button_text, button_url, image_url, vertical_padding: 0-300, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}} // AI Hint: Software/app focus.
features: {title, layout_style: "grid"|"bento", variant: 0-2, items: [{title, description, image_url, link_url}], bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}} // AI Hint: Explain benefits.
products: {title, layout_style: "grid_2"|"grid_3"|"list"|"carousel", whatsapp_number, mobile_columns: 1|2, show_category_filter: bool, categories: [string], items: [{id, name, price, description, image_url, button_text, purchase_url, category}], card_style: "classic"|"modern"|"minimal", hover_effect: "none"|"scale"|"elevate"|"glow", stagger_animations: bool, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}} // AI Hint: E-commerce catalog.
featured_product: {name, price, description, image_url, button_text, badge_text, layout_style: "split"|"centered"|"reversed", whatsapp_number, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}} // AI Hint: Single high-value item.
bento_store: {title, items: [{name, price, image_url}], layout_style: "modern"|"tight"|"glass", whatsapp_number, hover_effect: "none"|"scale"|"elevate"|"glow", stagger_animations: bool, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}} // AI Hint: Magazine-style store.
pricing (v1 - legacy): {title, schema_version: 1, variant: 0-2, items: [{name, price, features: [string], is_popular: bool}], bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding}
pricing (v2 - toggle): {title, subtitle, schema_version: 2, has_toggle: true, variant: 0-2, toggle_labels: {monthly: "شهري", yearly: "سنوي"}, items: [{plan_id, name, prices: {monthly: num, yearly: num}, currency, periods: {monthly, yearly}, discount_mode: "hidden"|"auto"|"manual", manual_discount_text, features: [string], button_text, button_action_type: "link"|"checkout", button_action_value, is_popular}], bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}} // AI Hint: Subscription tiers.
testimonials: {title, items: [{author, role, quote, image_url}], layout_style: "masonry"|"carousel", bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}} // AI Hint: Social proof.
faq: {title, items: [{question, answer, image_url}], card_style, hover_effect, stagger_animations, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}} // AI Hint: Objection handling.
gallery: {title, display_mode: "grid"|"carousel"|"masonry", grid_columns: 1-6, items: [image_url_string], gallery_links: [url_string], card_style, hover_effect, stagger_animations, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}} // AI Hint: Visual showcase.
contact_info: {title, email, phone, location, phone_icon, email_icon, location_icon, card_style, hover_effect, stagger_animations, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
video_embed: {title, subtitle, video_url, aspect_ratio: "16:9"|"4:3"|"1:1"|"9:16", max_width, use_thumbnail: bool, thumbnail_url, autoplay: bool, show_controls: bool, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
logo_header: {title, logo_url, logo_height: num, alignment: "left"|"center"|"right", bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding}
lead_form: {title, button_text, whatsapp_auto_open: bool, whatsapp_number, whatsapp_message_template, fields: [{field_id, field_type: "text"|"email"|"phone"|"textarea"|"select", label, placeholder, is_required: bool, options: [{value, label}], validation: {min_length}}], card_style, hover_effect, stagger_animations, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
lead_magnet: {title, subtitle, button_text, image_url, whatsapp_auto_open, whatsapp_number, fields: [same as lead_form], card_style, hover_effect, stagger_animations, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
multi_step_lead_form: {title, subtitle, success_message, enable_local_save: bool, schema_version, whatsapp_auto_open, whatsapp_number, steps: [{step_id, step_title, fields: [same as lead_form]}], bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
working_hours: {title, schedule: {day_label: "time_range"}, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding}
location_map: {title, address, map_iframe_url, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding}
trust_logos: {title, items: [logo_image_url_string], card_style, hover_effect, stagger_animations, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
animated_counter: {title, items: [{value, label, prefix, suffix}], card_style, hover_effect, stagger_animations, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
social_qr: {title, subtitle, links: [{platform: "website"|"instagram"|"facebook"|"twitter"|"linkedin"|"whatsapp", url, image_url}], card_style, hover_effect, stagger_animations, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
qr_code: {title, subtitle, qr_payload, qr_size: 100-350, card_style, hover_effect, stagger_animations, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
whatsapp: {title, phone_number, message, button_text, card_style, hover_effect, stagger_animations, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
basic_section: {title, layout_direction: "column"|"row", spacing: 0-100, vertical_padding, main_axis_alignment: "start"|"center"|"end"|"spaceBetween", cross_axis_alignment: "start"|"center"|"end"|"stretch", elements: [{id, type: "text"|"image", content, url, width, height, fit, style_overrides: {}}], bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
statistics_grid: {title, subtitle, items: [{value, label, icon}], bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
team_members: {title, subtitle, items: [{name, role, bio, image_url, socials}], bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
service_steps: {title, subtitle, items: [{title, description}], bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
cta_banner: {title, subtitle, button_text, button_url, secondary_button_text, secondary_button_url, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
comparison_table: {title, subtitle, plans: [{name, price}], features: [{name, values: [bool_per_plan]}], bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding}
